center.name: 查格雷斯河
center.summary: 查格雷斯河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括小食蝇霸鹟、Rusty-margined flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: cayanensisChagres River, Panama | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Myiozetetes | species = cayanensis | authority = (Linnaeus, 1766) | synonyms = Muscicapa cayanensis | range_map = Myiozetetes cayanensis map.svg }} The rusty-margined flycatcher (Myiozetetes cayanensis) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Panama and every mainland South American country except Chile and Uruguay, though only as a vagrant to Argentina.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: panamenseChagres River, Panama | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Philohydor | parent_authority = Lanyon, W, 1984 | species = lictor | authority = (Lichtenstein, MHC, 1823) | synonyms = * Lanius lictor (protonym) * Pitangus lictor | range_map = Philohydor lictor map.svg }} The lesser kiskadee (Philohydor lictor) is a species of passerine bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Panama and every mainland South American country except Chile, Paraguay, and Uruguay, though only as a vagrant in Argentina.Remsen, J
